meaning: n.[总称](各种样式的)牛仔裤 牛仔装
examples: Our company produces various series style dresses, including men's and women's fashionable dress, children's dress, underdress, sportswear, jeanswear, etc.
The material is very important to good jeanswear.
Provide serial jeanswear designs, and production supervision for branding companies.
Jeanswear: (25.6% of total business) Wrangler, Lee, Riders, Rustler and others.
